---
title: "Muhao Chen on Robust IE @ NAACL 2022"
description: "Muhao Chen at NAACL 2022 on robust, faithful, and logically coherent IE."
author: "synesis"
date: "2022-07-10"
categories: [NLP, knowledge graphs, conference, NAACL]
image: cover.jpg
---

::: {layout-ncol=2}
![NAACL 2022 IE tutorial. Image from [Cognitive Computation Group, Penn](https://cogcomp.seas.upenn.edu/page/tutorial.202207/).](cover.jpg)

![Slide from Chen's talk at the [Cognitive Computation Group, Penn](https://cogcomp.seas.upenn.edu/page/tutorial.202207/).](02.jpg)

![Slide from Chen's talk at the [Cognitive Computation Group, Penn](https://cogcomp.seas.upenn.edu/page/tutorial.202207/).](03.jpg)
:::
Excellent talk by Professor Muhao Chen at NAACL2022 tutorial on New Frontiers of Information Extraction. The topics on Robust Learning and Inference for IE are also dear to my heart: given the cost and wide verities of subject matter, how do we learn robust, faithful, and logically coherent IE models to extract knowledge?

Tutorial site: <https://cogcomp.seas.upenn.edu/page/tutorial.202207/>


*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_naacl2022-nlgpu-informationextraction-activity-6951955766861832192-Rm7g).*
